name: Basic Cookie Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift dry ingredients together into a large bowl, mixing well.
2. With a pastry blender, cut the shortening into dry ingredients until evenly distributed.
3. Transfer the mixture to a large airtight container and label as Basic Cookie mix.
4. Store in a cool, dry place and use within 10 to 12 weeks.
5. Makes about 16 cups of mix.
